Plaintiffs Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreements With Defendants Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Broderick H Brown And Exhibits
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NESTER LOPEZ'S unopposed Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreements With Defendants is granted.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.
